howItWorks.intro: This social media addiction calculator uses standard formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Lifetime total assumes 50 years of usage
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: How much social media time is average?
faq.answer: US adults average 2 hours 27 minutes per day on social media (2026). Ages 16-24 average nearly 3 hours. This totals about 6 years of a lifetime.

faq.question: Is social media addictive?
faq.answer: Yes — platforms are designed to be addictive using variable rewards, social validation, and infinite scroll. The brain's dopamine system responds to likes and notifications similarly to slot machines.

faq.question: What are the mental health effects?
faq.answer: Research links heavy social media use to increased anxiety, depression, body image issues, sleep disruption, FOMO, and reduced attention span. The effects are strongest in teens.

faq.question: How do I reduce usage?
faq.answer: Delete apps (use browser only), turn off notifications, set daily time limits, create phone-free zones, use grayscale mode, and replace scrolling with a specific hobby.

faq.question: Is the Social Media Addiction Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

sections.title: What Is the Social Media Addiction Calculator?
sections.body: The Social Media Addiction Calculator is a free online tool designed for individuals seeking balance who need quick, accurate calculations in the mental health and wellness space. By entering your daily social media, phone pickups/day, minutes on phone before bed, you get instant results including yearly hours on social media, that's how many full days, usage level. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting yearly hours on social media right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In mental health and wellness, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by individuals seeking balance worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to support your mental well-being with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your daily social media and need to find the right yearly hours on social media. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.
